headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex scale for mid-cap renewables) — Waaree Energies' expansion signals growth but poses limited immediate ESG or financial risk.
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered for disclosure, but no deadlines or penalties imminent.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is N/A.
No material change in cost of capital; green capex could support future financing.
